label: Watchdog
info: Monitors all JCTsh component heartbeats via wildcard subscription (jctsh/+/+/heartbeat). If any component stops reporting for 10 minutes (2x the 5-minute heartbeat interval), sends a push notification via HA companion app (Pixel 10 Pro XL) and logs the alert. New components are picked up automatically — no changes to this flow needed when new components are added.

name: Timer manager (per component)
Build alert
Log HA response
